title: Syriatel Mobile Platform
subtitle: Telecom & fintech app for Syria's largest carrier
description: Developed and maintained native iOS (Swift) and Android (Java) apps for Syriatel, architecting secure payment flows and performance-optimised experiences under high-volume concurrent load. Remediated security vulnerabilities from external penetration tests and built XCTest/Espresso automation suites that cut manual testing time by 30%.

title: IoT Smart Parking Platform
subtitle: MQTT-connected parking management for Omnitec Group
description: Led mobile R&D for an IoT-connected parking platform integrating smart locks, IP cameras, LPR systems, and MQTT-enabled sensors. Consolidated 5+ fragmented app variants into a single modular, feature-toggled Flutter codebase — cutting duplication by 60% and reducing new feature delivery time by 40%.

title: White-Label ERP Platform
subtitle: Multi-tenant enterprise ERP for ClefinCode
description: Provided senior technical leadership for a white-label multi-tenant ERP serving multiple enterprise clients from one codebase. Delivered OAuth2/JWT auth, RBAC, PCI-DSS-compliant encrypted storage, and offline-first sync with conflict resolution — all within a modular architecture enabling rapid tenant onboarding without duplication.
